name: Italian Meatballs and Spaghetti
recipeIngredient: 1 can (14.5 oz) Whole tomatoes, undrained and crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the ground beef, bread crumbs and egg.
2. Shape into 20 balls; place on baking sheet.
3. Bake at 375°F for 25 minutes; drain.
4. In a large saucepan, sauté onions in oil until tender.
5. Stir in remaining ingredients except cheese and spaghetti.
6. Simmer while the meatballs bake.
7. Add drained meatballs to pan; simmer, covered, an additional 20 minutes.
8. Stir in cheese and serve over spaghetti.
